raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A red can and a clear plastic bottle are on a light gray table. The red can is cylindrical with a metallic top; the bottle is transparent with a narrow neck. STRATEGY - To knock the can over, first reach for it, grasp its body for stability, then apply a forceful push to tip it. Failure mode: if the can is already knocked over, the task is complete. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the can body; Step 2 grasp the can body for secure hold; Step 3 push the can body to tip it over.**
Goal: knocked_over(red_can)
Scene: red_can, clear_bottle, table
Step 1: reach(red_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the red can
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_can, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_can) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the red can
  contact: holding(red_can) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_can)
Step 3: push(red_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the red can
  contact: pushing(red_can) [completion]
  direction: push_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: knocked_over(red_can)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the red can
the body of the red can
the body of the red can
